Author: KKT
Name: SoundMixer
Punchline: Advanced FFXIV Sound Effect Volume Mixer
Description: 【国际 Global 构建】Per-SCD-path volume control: groups, Glob, presets, live monitor, blacklist, BGM/ambient, IPC, debug hooks. PlaySound off by default; always safe path resolve. 0–350% gain. Commands: /soundmixer, /smix
Changelog: 0.2.3.1: Safe path always on (Safe Mode removed). Fix load CTD and nested footstep child groups; SoundEnforcement unified. See in-app changelog.
FeedbackMessage: Please include steps to reproduce and the sound path if reporting a matching issue.
